gaps: LLM judge variance still ~5pts even with median
no external demand signal for product-quality scoring
strengths: UVP: only tool measuring product quality (not code quality) inside Claude Code
scoring.evidence: Category of one: plant-and-revert loop tied to product beliefs. SonarQube/CI measure code. rhino-os measures user value. No named competitor.
scoring.viability_method: UVP — unique value proposition, not usage data

strengths: UVP: predict-grade-consolidate loop that compounds across sessions — no competitor has this
learning.evidence: Genuinely novel: wrong predictions update a causal model with zone-aware consolidation. Cursor has no session memory. Copilot has no prediction tracking. The learning loop is the moat.
learning.viability_method: UVP — unique value proposition, not usage data

strengths: UVP: deepest CC plugin in existence — intent routing + measurement + multi-agent orchestration
commands.evidence: Category-defining. No other CC plugin has 21 deep skills with scripts, references, templates, and 14 named agents. Closest competitors are single-file CLAUDE.md configs. No named competitor.
commands.viability_method: UVP — unique value proposition, not usage data

gaps: plugin end-to-end not tested in CI
install is commodity — not a differentiator
install.evidence: Well-executed but undifferentiated. Plugin marketplace install is the CC standard. Nobody chooses a product because install.sh is good.
install.viability_method: UVP — unique value proposition, not usage data

gaps: import not wired to skill task generation yet
backlog management is the most crowded dev tool category
todo.evidence: Complete backlog system but commodity category. Linear, Jira, Todoist, GitHub Issues all exist. Decay + eval-aware promote is mildly interesting but not a reason to install.
todo.viability_method: UVP — unique value proposition, not usage data

gaps: walkthrough output may drift from actual
docs viability is derivative — communicates other features' UVP, doesn't create its own
docs.evidence: README clearly communicates 'product quality not code quality' — a claim no competitor makes. Comparison table differentiates against SonarQube, CI, Linear, Cursor. But docs reflect the product's UVP, they don't create their own.
docs.viability_method: UVP — unique value proposition, not usage data
